mechanism: The 3m10y un-inversion occurred primarily (~75%) from term premium expansion rather than changed growth expectations, degrading the spread's recession-prediction reliability. Both effects stem from the same root cause: fiscal supply pressure elevating term premium at the long end while the front end remains policy-anchored.
regime_dependence: Active whenever term premium is rising due to fiscal supply. Was not operative in the low/stable term premium era when the 3m10y model was calibrated.
